name: Billy Joel
bio: Billy Joel keeps earning through a deep, high-recognition songbook that still performs across streaming, radio memory, and event-driven catalog listening.
notable_for: One of the strongest piano-led pop catalogs of the 1970s and 1980s.
career_highlight: Piano Man remains a flagship catalog song with unusually strong multi-generational replay value.
revenue_drivers: Classic-pop and singer-songwriter streaming sustain recurring listening.
Event, wedding, and nostalgia-driven replay support durable catalog demand.
Strong writer-side participation improves retained value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Billy Joel's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Billy Joel's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
